basic_details.job_title: DHS Tiruppur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 97 Hospital Worker, Staff Nurse and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Health Society (DHS), Tiruppur / District NHM, Tiruppur
basic_details.application_mode: Online (https://tiruppur.nic.in/notice_category/recruitment/) and/or in person / by post to DHS office
basic_details.short_information: DHS Tiruppur is recruiting 97 contractual posts across 15 categories under NHM, last date for submission of applications 29 June 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee has been mentioned in the notification. Candidates may verify with the DHS Tiruppur office at 0421-2478503 before submitting applications.

age_limit.details: Note: Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of Tamil Nadu rules for reserved category candidates. Vacancies reserved for currently serving contractual staff will be given priority; the number of such posts may be revised.

qualification.details: post: Essential Qualification | medical officer (uhwc): MBBS Degree awarded by a university or institution recognized by the UGC for the purpose of its grants; course approved by Medical Council of India / NMC; registered in Tamil Nadu Medical Council. | staff nurse / mlhp (uhwc / rural): Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery (DGNM) or B.Sc. Nursing from an institution recognized by the Indian Nursing Council. | multi purpose health worker (health inspector – grade ii): Must have passed Plus Two with Biology or Botany and Zoology; must have passed Tamil language as a subject in SSLC level; must possess 2-year certificate in Multi Purpose Health Worker (male) / Health Inspector / Sanitary Inspector course from a recognized private institution / Trust / University / Deemed University, including Gandhigram Rural Institute training course certificate granted by the Director of Public Health and Preventive Medicine. | dental surgeon: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) from Government / Govt.-approved private colleges recognized by Dental Council of India and registered under Tamil Nadu Dental Council. | physiotherapist: Bachelor's Degree in Physiotherapy (BPT). Desirable: At least 2 years of experience working in a hospital. | audiologist (audiologist & speech therapists) – gmch: B.Sc. Audiologist; must have passed HSC with Physics, Chemistry, Biology and any one related subject; must have passed a 1-year certificate course in Audiometry from Government Medical Institutions under DME control or any other institution recognized by State or Central Government. | audiometrician / audiometric assistant – jdhs: Technical person with 1-year Diploma in Hearing, Language and Speech (DHLS) from an RCI-recognized institute. | audiologist & speech language pathologist – jdhs: Bachelor in Audiology & Speech Language Pathology / B.Sc. (Speech and Hearing) from an RCI-recognized institute. | early interventionist cum special educator cum social worker: Post Graduate in Sociology / Social Work or Bachelor in Physiotherapy. | occupational therapist: Bachelor's / Master's Degree in Occupational Therapy from a recognized university. Minimum service period of 2 years is required; contract renewed after every 11 months subject to performance appraisal. Continuance not entertained beyond the end date of the TN-Rights project. | account assistant: B.Com graduate with minimum experience in maintenance of accounts; must have computer skills and be well versed in operating Tally Package. | lab technician (grade iii): Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology course (2 years duration) conducted by King Institute of Preventive Medicine or any institution recognized by the Government of Tamil Nadu; OR (i) Must have passed +2 Examination AND (ii) Certificate in Medical Laboratory Technology Course (1 year duration) from any institution recognized by the Director of Medical Education AND (iii) Must have good physique, good vision, and capacity to do outdoor work. | counsellor: Graduate/Post Graduate degree in Psychology / Social Work / Sociology / Anthropology / Human Development / Nursing with minimum 3 years of experience in HIV/AIDS. (Special concession may be given for PLHIV.) | ot technician / ot assistant: 3-month OT Technician course from a recognized university / institution. | hospital worker / mphw / sanitary worker / security: 8th Standard passed; should be able to read and write in Tamil.

vacancy_details.Name of Post: Multi Purpose Health Worker (Health Inspector – Grade II)
Early Interventionist cum Special Educator cum Social Worker
Hospital Worker / MPHW / Sanitary Worker / Security (Rural / Urban / GMCH / JDHS)

selection_process: Selection mode varies by post. Medical Officer (UHWC)
and Multi Purpose Health Worker posts are filled through Non-Interview (merit-based) process. All remaining posts are filled through Interview. For Interview-based posts

shortlisted candidates will be called for certificate verification followed by the interview. Candidates already serving as contractual staff in the vacancy positions will be given priority. For posts already filled
applications received from candidates in the district will be considered; where no such candidate is available in the district
candidates from other districts will be considered as per merit order.
merit scores are based on academic qualification marks. For interview posts
the interview committee constituted by the District Health Society will evaluate candidates based on qualifications
how_to_apply: Candidates must register their application form online at https://tiruppur.nic.in/notice_category/recruitment/ and then submit the application along with self-attested copies of all relevant certificates either in person or by post to the DHS Tiruppur office on or before 29-06-2026 (05:00 PM).
Documents to be Attached along with Application:
Self-attested copies of 10th, 12th, Degree/Diploma Certificates with Mark Sheets
Self-attested copies of all relevant qualifications and experience certificates prescribed for the post
Self-attested copies of registration certificates (Tamil Nadu Medical Council / Tamil Nadu Dental Council / Indian Nursing Council / RCI, as applicable)
Community certificate (if applicable) in prescribed format
Any other supporting documents relevant to the post applied for
Address for Submission: Executive Director / District Health Officer, District Health Society (NHM), 147-Pooluvapatti Road, Neeruperichsal Salai, Tiruppur – 641 602. Phone: 0421-2478503
important_instructions: This contract appointment is not permanent in nature and will not be regularized at any stage under any circumstances. Candidates must provide a Self-declaration (Undertaking) and must be willing to execute an 11-month contract bond at the time of joining. Applications must be submitted online first via the URL https://tiruppur.nic.in/notice_category/recruitment/ and then physically/by post to the DHS office with all required self-attested certificates before 29-06-2026 at 05:00 PM. Applications without complete enclosures will not be considered for scrutiny. Vacancies where currently serving contractual staff are in position will be given priority to eligible persons in those posts. The number of such vacancies may be revised. For interview-based posts, eligible candidates from the district will be called first; candidates from other districts will be considered only if no eligible district candidates are available. For direct/non-interview posts, merit will be determined based on marks scored in the prescribed academic qualifications. Candidates already serving in these positions in other districts may also apply and compete for posts in Tiruppur District. All original certificates must be produced at the time of certificate verification / interview. The contract will be renewed after every 11 months subject to performance appraisal and availability of NHM funds/programme requirements.

all_official_links.label: Download District Health Society Tiruppur NHM Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of posts in DHS Tiruppur NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 97 posts across 15 categories including Hospital Worker/MPHW/Sanitary Worker/Security (44), Multi Purpose Health Worker/Health Inspector Grade II (21), Staff Nurse/MLHP (11), Medical Officer UHWC (6), Lab Technician Grade III (4), Counsellor (2), and 1 post each for Dental Surgeon, Physiotherapist, Audiologist GMCH, Audiometrician JDHS, Audiologist & SLP JDHS, Early Interventionist, Occupational Therapist, Account Assistant, and OT Technician.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to submit applications for DHS Tiruppur NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of completed applications is 29-06-2026 by 05:00 PM.

faq.question: Q3. Are the posts in DHS Tiruppur NHM Recruitment 2026 permanent government jobs?
faq.answer: No. All posts are purely on a contract basis under the National Health Mission (NHM). The appointment will not be made permanent or regularized at any stage, as stated explicitly in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the mode of selection for DHS Tiruppur NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Medical Officer (UHWC), Staff Nurse/MLHP, and Multi Purpose Health Worker posts are filled through a non-interview (merit-based) process. All other posts are filled through a personal interview process.

faq.question: Q5. What is the consolidated pay for Medical Officer (UHWC) post in DHS Tiruppur 2026?
faq.answer: The consolidated pay for Medical Officer (UHWC) is Rs. 63,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What qualification is required for the Lab Technician (Grade III) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a 2-year Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology from King Institute of Preventive Medicine or any TN Govt. recognized institution; OR pass +2, possess a 1-year MLT Certificate from an institution recognized by the Director of Medical Education, and have good physique and vision for outdoor work.

faq.question: Q7. Where should the application be submitted for DHS Tiruppur NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must first be registered online at https://tiruppur.nic.in/notice_category/recruitment/ and then submitted with self-attested certificate copies in person or by post to: Executive Director/District Health Officer, District Health Society, 147-Pooluvapatti Road, Neeruperichsal Salai, Tiruppur – 641 602.

faq.question: Q8. Is Tamil language mandatory for any post in DHS Tiruppur NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. For the Multi Purpose Health Worker (Health Inspector Grade II) post, candidates must have passed Tamil as a subject at SSLC level. For Hospital Worker/MPHW/Sanitary Worker/Security posts, candidates must be able to read and write in Tamil.

faq.question: Q9. What documents must be attached with the application for DHS Tiruppur NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Self-attested copies of 10th, 12th, Degree/Diploma certificates with marksheets, experience certificates, registration certificates (Medical/Dental/Nursing Council, RCI as applicable), community certificates (if applicable), the Undertaking/Self-declaration, and 11-month contract bond document.

faq.question: Q10. Will currently serving NHM contractual staff get priority in DHS Tiruppur NHM Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. As per the notification, vacancies where contractual staff are already serving will give priority to currently eligible persons in those positions. For interview posts, eligible candidates from Tiruppur District are given first preference over candidates from other districts.
